meta.description: Australian federal candidate transparency dataset (48th Parliament). Roster from AEC Members Elected (House) and OpenAustralia (Senate); donor data from AEC Member of Parliament returns. Policy positions are added separately with their own sources. See ../CONTRIBUTING.md.

donors.summary: Donations disclosed directly to this member in AEC Member of Parliament returns. Note: member returns capture only donations made directly to the member, not money received via a party; figures are partial.
